reviews.comment:
HAY UN CAMPING PARA DESCANSAR BAJO DE ÁRBOLES . LOS SANITARIOS LIMPIOS Y PAPELES DE MANO E HIGIÉNICO.
ES UN ACA YPF

(Translated by Google)
There's a campsite where you can rest under the trees. The restrooms are clean, and there are hand and toilet paper available.
It's an ACA YPF station.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, pero pude pagar con tarjeta de débito, porque no hay señal, de casualidad tenía efectivo, deben solucionar ese tema👌

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, but I was only able to pay with a debit card because there was no signal; I just happened to have cash. They need to fix that issue. 👌

reviews.comment:
Es una parada obligada para las que viajamos a la zona de Punilla Córdoba. No hay GNC, y el bar no siempre está abierto.

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-stop for those of us traveling to the Punilla region of Córdoba. There's no CNG, and the bar isn't always open.
